subject: reading
activity_templates: A 5th-grade reading comprehension worksheet. A 3-paragraph kid-friendly fiction passage with a small illustration. 5 short-answer questions below (main idea, theme, inference, character analysis, vocabulary) with writing lines. {{character}} reads alongside.

A 5th-grade non-fiction comprehension worksheet about a kid-safe science or history topic. 3-paragraph passage with a diagram. 4 comprehension questions, mix of multiple-choice and short-answer. {{character}} points at the diagram.

A 5th-grade figurative-language worksheet. A short passage with underlined similes, metaphors, and idioms. 5 questions asking the child to identify and interpret each. {{character}} taps chin thoughtfully.

A 5th-grade 'summarize the passage' worksheet. A 3-paragraph passage at the top and three summary-outline boxes below (beginning, middle, end) for the child to fill in. {{character}} sits beside the passage.
